name: claude-code-usage-tracker
description: Track your Claude Code token usage and estimated cost from your local logs, right in the status bar.

commands.title: Claude Code Usage Tracker: Show Dashboard

claudeCodeUsageTracker.refreshIntervalSe.description: How often to refresh usage data, in seconds.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.currency.description: ISO currency code used to format cost estimates.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.decimalPlaces.description: Decimal places shown for cost figures.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.showLimits.description: Show 5-hour and weekly plan-limit utilization in the status bar.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.showOpusWeekly.description: Also show the weekly Opus limit (opus NN%) in the status bar, after the 5-hour and weekly figures. Requires Show Limits and a live weekly-Opus window.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.showContext.description: Show the current session's context-window fill (like /context) in the status bar.

enumDescriptions: Group by the enclosing git repository.
claudeCodeUsageTracker.projectGroupingMo.description: How the dashboard's By project breakdown groups working directories.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.showCost.description: Show today's estimated cost in the status bar.

claudeCodeUsageTracker.showTokens.description: Show today's token count in the status bar.
